summary: Iteration 117 - UX Cleanup Testing: All 10 frontend tests passed (100%). Verified removal of attendance declaration/reclassification actions from appointment detail page. Fixed one wording issue in OrganizerCheckinBlock.js (Présence confirmée → Check-in effectué).

frontend_playwright: ✅ Appointment detail page loads correctly without errors
✅ No 'Reclasser' buttons found on appointment detail page
✅ No 'Évaluer' or 'Re-évaluer' buttons found in AttendancePanel
✅ /presences page loads correctly and shows pending attendance sheets
✅ AttendanceSheetPage still accessible and works (declaration form)
✅ Check-in wording verified: 'Effectuer mon check-in' (participant), 'Check-in avec GPS' (physical), 'Check-in effectué' (confirmed)
✅ OrganizerCheckinBlock pending state shows 'Check-in non effectué'
✅ DisputeCenter.js not imported in App.js (verified via grep)
code_verification: ✅ AttendancePanel.js is read-only (no action buttons, only status badges)

context_for_next_testing_agent: UX cleanup complete. Attendance declarations now ONLY possible via /presences page. Appointment detail page is read-only for attendance. Check-in (GPS/technical) stays with updated wording. PendingReviewSection and DisputeCenter.js were deleted. Fixed OrganizerCheckinBlock.js confirmed state wording from 'Présence confirmée' to 'Check-in effectué'.

features_verified.1_appointment_detail_loads: ✅ VERIFIED - No broken imports, page loads correctly
features_verified.2_no_reclasser_buttons: ✅ VERIFIED - No 'Reclasser' buttons on appointment detail
features_verified.3_no_evaluer_buttons: ✅ VERIFIED - No 'Évaluer' or 'Re-évaluer' buttons in AttendancePanel
features_verified.4_attendance_panel_readonly: ✅ VERIFIED - AttendancePanel displays status badges only, no action buttons
features_verified.7_checkin_wording_organizer_video: ✅ VERIFIED - 'Effectuer mon check-in' in AppointmentHeader for video
features_verified.8_checkin_wording_organizer_physical: ✅ VERIFIED - 'Check-in avec GPS' in AppointmentHeader for physical
features_verified.9_checkin_confirmed_wording: ✅ VERIFIED - 'Check-in effectué' in AppointmentHeader and OrganizerCheckinBlock
features_verified.12_presences_page_works: ✅ VERIFIED - /presences page loads and shows pending sheets
features_verified.14_dispute_center_removed: ✅ VERIFIED - DisputeCenter.js not imported in App.js

fix_applied.reason: Updated wording to match new check-in terminology
